who: small business owners using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 employees
offer: For small business owners using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 employees, manual entry of employee hours causes payroll inaccuracies. We provide a timesheet aggregator instead of manual timesheet tracking and entry into QuickBooks.
problem: manual entry of employee hours leading to payroll inaccuracies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks users
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payroll
DM outreach to small business owners with demo video
Share insights in community forums for QuickBooks users
try_it: Let users try manual entry of hours and export reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of payroll reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
